content:
Aquarius November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy Theme Claim the role, reopen the joy
Key Dates Venus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 10th house) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 7th) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (5th house)
Love Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 7th house of partnership is one of 2026’s loudest relationship moments
Career 10th house Scorpio New Moon is one of 2026’s biggest career fresh starts
Crystal of the Month Lapis Lazuli
Lucky Colors Deep royal blue, electric indigo, gold-flecked sapphire
Lucky Number 5
Affirmation I claim the role October reviewed; I reopen the joy it freed.

This Month’s Energy

Aquarius, November 2026 claims the role and reopens the joy. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October’s retrograde season. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 10th house of career, public role, and reputation — one of the year’s biggest career fresh starts. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo, your 7th house of partnership and marriage — a peak relationship moment. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 5th house of romance, creativity, play, and children — a joy climax. November’s pattern: claim the role early, reopen the joy late.

Key Dates for Aquarius in November 2026

Date Transit Meaning for Aquarius Do / Avoid
Nov 8 New Moon in Scorpio 10th house — fresh start in career, public role, reputation; one of the year’s clearest “be seen” new beginnings Do: claim the title, accept the role, ship the public work, refine the direction
Avoid: hiding from visibility after October’s review
Nov 13 Venus + Mercury station direct Station day — the retrograde season ends; clarity returns to role, relationship, and communication matters Do: move forward on the role, sign the agreement, claim the visibility
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16 Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53′ Leo 7th house — partnership, marriage, contracts peak; a once-every-two-years amplification of significant bonds Do: commit to the partnership, mend the significant tie, sign the contract, marry
Avoid: hiding from a relationship decision at a once-every-two-years peak
Nov 24 Beaver Full Moon in Gemini 5th house — climax around romance, creativity, play, children; a long-building joyful project or romantic connection matures Do: make the art, claim the romance, schedule the play, ship the creative work
Avoid: postponing joy until the role is perfect
Nov 22 Sun enters Sagittarius 11th house season — community, friends, collective vision through late December Do: claim the role in the group, mend the friendship, name the dream
Avoid: clinging to a circle that no longer fits
Early Nov Mars moves through Leo (your 7th) Partnership, contracts, significant others stay action zones; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the bond momentum Do: reach out to the partner, refine the contract, mend the tie
Avoid: avoiding the partnership conversation

Career & Money

For Aquarius, November’s career story opens at the 10th house New Moon. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 is one of 2026’s clearest career fresh starts — and after October’s Venus retrograde review of your 10th house, the path forward is clear.

Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 7th house on November 16 brings partnership-led work — clients, contracts, working alliances — to a once-every-two-years peak. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 5th house) shifts focus to creative work and joy. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 11th house) on November 22 amps the collective. Crystals for wealth can support the visibility; the practical move is claim the role early, reopen the joy late.

Love & Relationships

The Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 7th house on November 16 is the love signature of the month — a once-every-two-years amplification of partnership, marriage, and significant bonds. After October’s Venus retrograde review, this is the green light.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 10th house) shifts the role — relationship meets the public self. Venus stationing direct on November 13 releases the role-rooted relationship review. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 5th house) brings romance to a climax. Crystals for love can support the reopening; the deeper practice is claiming the role so the joy can be honest.

Health & Wellness

November’s wellness story emphasizes the ankles, circulation, and the nervous system. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 10th house) can amplify ambition — protect the body from overwork. The 5th house Gemini Full Moon on November 24 invites play as medicine.

Lapis Lazuli, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with clear communication, truth, and the third eye — a useful symbolic companion for a Uranus/Saturn-ruled air sign emerging from a retrograde season. Aquarius often carries tension in the ankles, calves, and nervous system; gentle circulation-supporting movement, hydration, and screen-free evenings are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Lapis Lazuli

Why Lapis Lazuli fits Aquarius this month. You are Uranus- and Saturn-ruled — your reflex is innovation and structure, the bigger picture. November asks you to claim the role while reopening the joy and committing to the partnership. Lapis Lazuli — with its deep royal blue flecked with gold — is traditionally tied to clear communication, truth, and the inner voice. Where Amethyst would deepen and Aquamarine would cool, Lapis Lazuli sharpens into truth. Perfect for the 10th house Scorpio New Moon (claim the role) and the 5th house Gemini Full Moon (reopen the joy).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Lapis Lazuli at your throat or on your workspace on November 8 (the Scorpio New Moon). Hold it during the partnership peak around November 16.

Best date to use it: November 8, the Scorpio New Moon in your 10th house — hold Lapis Lazuli at your throat or third eye for 5 minutes at the New Moon, naming the role you’re claiming.

Read more: Lapis Lazuli Meaning and Best Crystals for Aquarius.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Aquarius — November 2026

When: November 8, the Scorpio New Moon in your 10th house.
Crystal: Lapis Lazuli.
Intention: Claim the role October reviewed.

  1. Cleanse Lapis Lazuli under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the New Moon). Let it sit at your throat or on your workspace through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three pieces of role you’re claiming — and the joy you’re ready to reopen at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: make the art, claim the romance, ship the creative work. Lapis Lazuli in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Aquarius New Moon in February 2027 (your 1st house): how has the role matured through the winter? Hold Lapis Lazuli during the review.

Shop Aquarius Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Aquarius crystal guide for stones connected with truth, clarity, role, and joy — including the Lapis Lazuli that sharpens the inner voice after a retrograde season. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Aquarius November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Aquarius?

It’s a claim-and-reopen month. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 10th house) is one of 2026’s biggest career fresh starts. Venus and Mercury station direct on November 13. The Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 (your 7th house) is a once-every-two-years partnership peak. The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 (your 5th house) is a romance and creativity climax.

How will the Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 affect Aquarius?

The conjunction in your 7th house of partnership and marriage is a once-every-two-years amplification of significant bonds. Commit to the partnership; mend the significant tie; sign the contract. Avoid hiding from a relationship decision at the peak.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Aquarius?

It falls in your 5th house of romance, creativity, play, and children — a climax around joy. Make the art; claim the romance; schedule the play; ship the creative work.

What is the best crystal for Aquarius in November 2026?

Lapis Lazuli — it sharpens the inner voice into truth, exactly what a 10th house Scorpio New Moon (claim the role) plus a 5th house Gemini Full Moon (reopen the joy) demand after a retrograde. See the full Aquarius crystal guide →

Why is the 10th house Scorpio New Moon so significant for Aquarius this year?

October’s Venus retrograde ran through your 10th house — the role has been under review for six weeks. The November 8 New Moon in the same house is the green light: the review is complete, the new role direction can begin.
